name: The Samaritan Woman
flavorText: "Whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst." — John 4:14
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide.
title: Drawer of Living Water
